domain: Giving AI coding agents good taste in frontend design using the open-source Taste Skill framework by Leon Lin (anti-slop SKILL.md ruleset: three dials, audit-first redesigns, image-first pipeline, anti-laziness rules, strict pre-flight check).
refresh_cadence: on-changelog for github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill and tasteskill.dev/changelog; monthly for the SKILL.md rules and the three dials; quarterly for ecosystem coverage (Emil Kowalski, Developers Digest, skill directories) and the Anthropic Agent Skills / SKILL.md format

researched_requires: at least two captured sources for fast-moving or high-stakes domains
at least one official/primary source for lower-risk domains
retrieved dates, refresh_due dates, source_type, confidence, and claim coverage

sources.title: Taste Skill - canonical v2 SKILL.md (design-taste-frontend)
claims: The three dials DESIGN_VARIANCE / MOTION_INTENSITY / VISUAL_DENSITY use a 1-10 scale with baseline 8 / 6 / 4, set conversationally not by editing the file
Em-dash (U+2014) and en-dash (U+2013) are banned anywhere visible; only the hyphen and math minus are allowed
Hero: headline max 2 lines, subtext max 20 words, CTA visible without scroll, pt-24 top-padding cap, max 4 text elements
Navigation renders on a single line at desktop with an 80px height cap (default 64-72px)
An 8-section page must use at least 4 different layout families; bento grids use exactly N cells for N items
Color/Shape/Page-Theme locks: one accent, one radius scale, one theme per page; premium-consumer beige+brass palette is banned by explicit hex
Section 14 is a mandatory pre-flight check; any failed box blocks completion
Section 11 redesign protocol defines Greenfield / Preserve / Overhaul modes and never-change-silently preservation rules
Scope is landing pages, portfolios, and redesigns; dashboards, data tables, and multi-step product UI are out of scope

sources.title: tasteskill.dev - official site (guide, docs, changelog, llms.txt)
claims: Positioning: 'The Anti-Slop Frontend Framework for AI Agents'; tagline 'Less slop, designs pop.'
Greenfield (Prompt 1) and Redesign (Prompt 2) workflows are published verbatim on the guide
Install: npx skills add https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill --skill "design-taste-frontend"
llms.txt states the dial scales as 1-10 with endpoints; the guide names the dials without scales
Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, v0, Lovable, OpenCode via the SKILL.md standard

sources.title: github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill - repo metadata, README, CHANGELOG, 13 skills
claims: License is MIT; repo created 2026-02-19; ~58,435 stars as of 2026-07-06; no git releases or tags
The repo ships 13 skills; the primary install name is design-taste-frontend
research/laziness/ backs the output-skill anti-laziness rules with a documented study
v2 is experimental, a pre-release iterating toward a v2.0.0 stable that will lock install name and dials

sources.title: Anthropic - Equipping agents for the real world with Agent Skills (SKILL.md format, progressive disclosure)
claims: Agent Skills are folders of instructions/scripts/resources agents discover and load dynamically
SKILL.md frontmatter requires at minimum name and description
Progressive disclosure loads name+description at discovery, the full SKILL.md at activation, and bundled files on demand
The format is published as an open standard for cross-platform portability

sources.title: W3C Design Tokens Community Group - first stable specification
claims: A design token expresses design decisions in a platform-agnostic way as a named single source of truth
The specification reached its first stable version in October 2025; token systems cover motion and density, not just color

sources.title: Developers Digest - Taste Skills Are Turning Agent Review Into Infrastructure
claims: A taste skill is a review checklist, style contract, and calibration artifact the agent routes through before claiming work is done
The frontier is better review moved earlier, written down, and reused - not just better generation
Taste Skill sits in a skills-as-infrastructure family with Stop Slop and the Compound Engineering Plugin

sources.title: andrew.ooo - Taste Skill Review (independent)
claims: Taste Skill is the first frontend skill that treats AI slop as a solvable engineering problem rather than a vibes problem
Criticism: the rules are strong opinions (e.g. the Inter ban), examples assume React/Next, and there is no automated test or visual-regression verification

sources.title: neodrop.ai - taste-skill v2: 3 dials and a 60-item preflight check
claims: The v2 rewrite grew from ~500 lines to ~25,000 words across 14 sections
Section 0 Brief Inference forces the agent to commit to a direction before touching layout
The '60-item' pre-flight figure is neodrop's characterization, not stated by the vendor

sources.title: Emil Kowalski - Agents with Taste (and Taste Skill sponsor)
claims: Design taste is articulable logic and can be codified into per-aspect skill files for agents
animations.dev (Emil Kowalski) is an official sponsor of Taste Skill alongside the Vercel OSS Program
His 'Agents with Taste' is a parallel, independent effort, not a review of Leon Lin's project

sources.title: Refactoring UI (Wathan & Schoger) + Butterick's Practical Typography
claims: Visual hierarchy via size/color/weight/placement is the most effective tool for making something feel designed
Default to more whitespace than feels necessary; add density deliberately
Body line length of 45-90 characters underlies the skill's max-w-[65ch] measure rule

sources.title: Why Your AI Keeps Building the Same Purple Gradient Website (AI slop = distributional convergence)
claims: LLMs are statistical pattern matchers that reach for the median of their training corpus, producing AI slop
The default purple traces to Tailwind's demo bg-indigo-500 saturating tutorials and training data
The fix is constraint (forbidden patterns, one direction), not 'make it beautiful' prompts
